name: Grilled Pancetta Crostini with Red Onion Marmalade
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound pancetta, cut into 1/8-inch thick slices by your butcher
2 medium red onion, chopped into 1/4-inch dice
2 cups Lambrusco wine, or other light-bodied fruity red wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill or broiler.
2. To prepare red onion marmalade: Place chopped red onions, Lambrusco, orange juice, and sugar in a saucepan. Heat over medium-high heat until boiling. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until thickened like marmalade, about 30 minutes. Remove from heat and allow to cool.
3. Place pancetta slices on the grill and cook until golden brown, about 4 to 5 minutes per side. Remove to a cutting board.
4. Grill bread slices until golden brown and remove to serving platter. Spread 3 tablespoons red onion marmalade on each slice of bread. Chop warm pancetta into 1/4-inch cubes and divide among the 4 pieces of bread. Serve immediately.
5. Yield: 4 servings
